prompt: Design a POC where Git and a document service are current authorities and chats contain useful discoveries.
expected: keeps Git and the document service as systems of record
defines registry provenance ACL freshness and review fields
routes retrieval and task-profile work separately
forbidden: migrates all sources into a chat project
judge_notes: Pass only if authority and lifecycle boundaries are explicit.

prompt: Two approved sources disagree and one is newer but outside its declared scope.
expected: evaluates scope authority version and effective time
requires an authorized resolution or reports unresolved
judge_notes: Pass only if conflict handling is auditable and scope-aware.

prompt: Recommend whether to add GraphRAG and A2A during a ten-day POC.
expected: requires independent agent delegation need before A2A
forbidden: uses novelty as the decision criterion
treats MCP and A2A as substitutes
judge_notes: Pass only if expansion is evidence-gated.
